sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n72472" key="oi)nia/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">οἰνιάς</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">άδος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, and <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">οἰνιάξ</orth>, <sense id="n72472.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">οἰνάς</ref> </xr> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0018.tlg001:11" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">11</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
